---
title: Funding
description: "Current and completed research funding awarded to the MINDSET programme, including projects supported by UKRI, ADR UK, and NIHR."

output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
---
```{r results = 'asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE}
library(orcidtr)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr2)
library(lubridate)

orcid_id <- "0000-0003-2881-4906"

fetch_funding_detail <- function(orcid_id, put_code) {
  url <- paste0("https://pub.orcid.org/v3.0/", orcid_id, "/funding/", put_code)
  resp <- request(url) |>
    req_headers(Accept = "application/json") |>
    req_error(is_error = \(r) FALSE) |>
    req_perform()
  if (resp_status(resp) != 200) return(list(description = NA, amount = NA, currency = NA, url = NA))
  b <- resp_body_json(resp)
  list(
    description = b$`short-description` %||% NA_character_,
    amount      = b$amount$value %||% NA_character_,
    currency    = b$amount$`currency-code` %||% NA_character_,
    url         = b$url$value %||% NA_character_
  )
}

funding_raw <- as_tibble(orcid_funding(orcid_id))

details <- map(funding_raw$put_code, \(pc) fetch_funding_detail(orcid_id, pc))

funding <- funding_raw |>
  mutate(
    description     = map_chr(details, "description"),
    amount          = map_chr(details, "amount"),
    currency        = map_chr(details, "currency"),
    url             = map_chr(details, "url"),
    start_year      = as.integer(substr(start_date, 1, 4)),
    start_month     = as.integer(substr(start_date, 6, 7)),
    end_year        = as.integer(substr(end_date,   1, 4)),
    end_month       = as.integer(substr(end_date,   6, 7)),
    currency_symbol = recode(coalesce(currency, ""), GBP = "£", USD = "$", EUR = "€", .default = coalesce(currency, "")),
    amount_fmt = if_else(
      !is.na(amount) & !is.na(currency),
      paste0(" for ", currency_symbol,
             formatC(as.numeric(amount), format = "f", digits = 0, big.mark = ",")),
      ""
    ),
    date_range = paste0(
      if_else(!is.na(start_month), as.character(month(start_month, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE)), ""),
      if_else(!is.na(start_year),  paste0(" ", start_year), ""),
      " to ",
      if_else(!is.na(end_month), as.character(month(end_month, label = TRUE, abbr = FALSE)), ""),
      if_else(!is.na(end_year),  paste0(" ", end_year), "")
    ),
    title_html = if_else(
      is.na(url) | str_trim(coalesce(url, "")) == "",
      paste0("<h2>", title, "</h2>"),
      paste0("<a href=\"", url, "\"><h2>", title, "</h2></a>")
    ),
    funding_html = paste0(
      title_html,
      "<em>Funded by ", organization, amount_fmt, " from ", date_range, "</em>",
      if_else(!is.na(description) & description != "",
              paste0("<br />", description), "")
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(start_year), desc(start_month)) |>
  pull(funding_html)

cat(str_c(funding))
```
